# GitHub Metadata

Purpose: repository governance, contribution intake, review templates, ownership metadata, and stage-appropriate automation.
Belongs here: issue forms, PR templates, CODEOWNERS, and workflows that honestly validate the repository's current stage.
Does not belong here: runtime code, product assets, fake build pipelines, or fake release automation.
Current stage: workflows validate repository hygiene, docs, proof-kernel compilation and deterministic capture, bounded project-adapter receipts, and release-scaffold inputs. Native Windows release builds remain a later evidence lane.
Type: repository metadata and automation.
